name: MAGE
description: Generate de novo paired heavy-light chain antibody variable sequences given an antigen target. Uses Progen2-based language model trained on antibody sequences. Outputs variable region sequences ready for experimental validation. Designed for antigen-specific antibody generation.
capabilities: Generate de novo paired heavy-light chain antibody variable sequences given an antigen target
Uses Progen2-based language model trained on antibody sequences
Outputs variable region sequences ready for experimental validation

antigen_sequence.description: Target antigen amino acid sequence for antigen-specific antibody generation

num_sequences.description: Number of paired heavy-light chain antibody sequences to generate

temperature.description: Sampling temperature controlling diversity of generated sequences
